actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 2 (1d4) piercing damage plus 9 (2d8) poison damage.

actions.name: Longbow
actions.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) piercing damage plus 4 (1d8) poison damage.

actions.name: Darkness
actions.description: Magical darkness spreads from a point you choose within range to fill a 15-foot-radius sphere for the duration. The darkness spreads around corners. A creature with darkvision can't see through this darkness, and nonmagical light can't illuminate it.

actions.name: Faerie Fire
actions.description: Each object in a 20-foot cube within range is outlined in blue, green, or violet light (your choice). Any creature in the area when the spell is cast is also outlined in light if it fails a dexterity saving throw. For the duration, objects and affected creatures shed dim light in a 10-foot radius.

special_abilities.name: Multiattack
special_abilities.description: The drider makes three attacks, either with its longsword or its longbow. It can replace one of those attacks with a bite attack.

special_abilities.name: Fey Ancestry
special_abilities.description: The drider has advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can't put the drider to sleep.

special_abilities.name: Innate Spellcasting
special_abilities.description:
The drider's innate spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 13). The drider can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:
At will: dancing lights
1/day each: darkness, faerie fire

special_abilities.name: Spider Climb
special_abilities.description: The drider can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

special_abilities.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
special_abilities.description: While in sunlight, the drider has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

special_abilities.name: Web Walker
special_abilities.description: The drider ignores movement restrictions caused by webbing.
